steps.character: Create your character — pick a Dao name.
steps.sect: Join a sect — choose one of three.
steps.cultivate: Start Cultivating to absorb spirit qi.
steps.breakthrough: Complete your first breakthrough — leave Mortal.
steps.leaderboard: Visit the leaderboard to size up your peers.
steps.mail: Check your mailbox — there may be gifts waiting.

notFound.title: 404 · Lost in the Void
notFound.desc: You have wandered into the void.

step1.title: Welcome to Dao Mon
lines: I am A Linh, spirit child to the Heavenly Herald.
You have just crossed from the mortal world; we will start this cultivation journey together.
First, tell me the dao name you wish to bear.

errors.tooShort: Dao name must be at least 3 characters.
errors.tooLong: Dao name must be at most 16 characters.
errors.invalid: Only letters, numbers, dot and underscore, no whitespace.
errors.taken: This dao name is already taken; please pick another.

step3.title: Pick Your Starting Sect
lines: Each sect has a distinct starting technique. Pick the one where you want to settle.

thanh_van.name: Thanh Van Sect
thanh_van.desc: Sword masters focused on bursty offense.

huyen_thuy.name: Huyen Thuy Palace
huyen_thuy.desc: Deep alchemy specialists; defense and healing.

tu_la.name: Tu La Cult
tu_la.desc: Demonic and savage — blood for power.

step4.title: Set Out
lines: {name}, from this moment you officially enter Qi Refining Stage 1.
Press ‘Start Cultivation’ to absorb qi. Your realm will grow with time.

topup.title: Top Up Tien Ngoc
topup.intro: Tien Ngoc is used for gacha, VIP perks, and unique skins & items.
topup.rule1: ⚠ Manual top-up via bank transfer: pick a pack → server issues a transfer code → scan QR / send exact amount + exact memo → admin approves. Each code is single-use.
topup.rule2: Max 5 pending orders per user. Wrong memo will be rejected.
topup.amount: Amount: {price} — will credit {ngoc} Tien Ngoc on approval.
topup.bankLine: Transfer to: {bank} — {name} — {number}. Memo must match the code exactly.
topup.orderCreatedToast: Order {code} created — transfer with the exact memo to get approved.

territory.subtitle: Regional influence — the most active sect dominates each region.

overview.buffNone: This region has no special buffs.
overview.buffOwnerHint: Buffs apply only to members of the sect currently holding the region.

territory_son_coc_exp.label: Son Coc Spirit Aura
territory_son_coc_exp.desc: +5% EXP when clearing dungeons in Son Coc.

territory_hac_lam_drop.label: Hac Lam Treasure
territory_hac_lam_drop.desc: +5% Spirit Stones when clearing dungeons in Hac Lam.

territory_moc_huyen_lam_dmg.label: Moc Huyen Lam Surge
territory_moc_huyen_lam_dmg.desc: +5% Wood damage in Moc Huyen Lam combat.

territory_kim_son_mach_dmg.label: Kim Son Mach Edge
territory_kim_son_mach_dmg.desc: +5% Metal damage in Kim Son Mach combat.

territory_hoang_tho_huyet_def.label: Hoang Tho Bulwark
territory_hoang_tho_huyet_def.desc: +5% defense in Hoang Tho Huyet combat.

myBuffs.title: Active buffs
myBuffs.empty: Your sect doesn't hold any region — no active region buffs.

leaderboard.empty: No sect has scored in this region yet.
leaderboard.pickHint: Pick a region above to view its leaderboard.

me.noSect: Join a sect to start contributing regional influence.

dungeon_clear.label: Dungeon clear
dungeon_clear.desc: Each dungeon clear in the region — 8 pts (cap 60/day).

boss_top_damage.label: Top boss damage
boss_top_damage.desc: Top damage on a regional boss — 20 pts bonus (cap 80/week).

admin.title: Admin: Territory Settlement
admin.subtitle: Crown owners for every region from current influence. Idempotent per periodKey.
admin.decaySubtitle: Reduce stale influence per period so no sect holds a region forever. Idempotent per periodKey.

war.title: Weekly Territory War
war.subtitle: Sects compete weekly. Owners are crowned every Monday 00:00 UTC.
war.regionNoContenders: No sect has scored in this region this period.
war.adminSubtitle: Crown owners now (idempotent per periodKey + region). For testing / fast-forward.

errors.NO_CHARACTER: No character yet — start your journey first.
errors.PERIOD_INVALID: Period key invalid (must be ISO week YYYY-Www or manual_*).
errors.ADMIN_ONLY: Only ADMIN can run territory settlement.
errors.UNKNOWN: Could not load territory data, please retry.
